resources.string: This application registers system Quick Settings tiles on your device to let you interact with settings and hardware features without clicking physical buttons.
Opens the default visual system volume slider panel immediately on-screen so you do not have to click the physical hardware volume keys.
Deep-links you directly to Android\'s Navigation Mode settings sub-page to toggle easily between 3-Button and Gesture navigation setups.
Opens an overlay dialog to select a system-wide force rotation direction. Selecting the last option disables overriding and reverts layout handling back to Android\'s default auto-rotate engine.
